title: Title
doc_html:
SUBPART B-1. CONSENT TO MEDICAL EXAMINATIONS

§1160.1. Title

            This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Consent to Medical Examinations Act".

            Acts 2020, No. 269, §1.
doc_text:
SUBPART B-1.  CONSENT TO MEDICAL EXAMINATIONS
§1160.1.  Title
This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Consent to Medical
Examinations Act".
Acts 2020, No. 269, §1.
